summary: Frontend-only test of (A) sponsor photo upload UX and (B) feature-your-business band + CTA. All acceptance criteria met.

test_results.feature_business_band: PASS - visible above footer, shows $29/mo, $290/yr, 'Save $58/yr' badge, and 'Feature your business' CTA. Clicking CTA opens sponsor-dialog with sponsor-plan-toggle visible.
test_results.sponsor_photo_upload: PASS - Selecting a JPG via sponsor-photo-upload hidden input triggers upload; 'Photo uploaded' success toast appears; sponsor-photo-preview img renders with src under /api/files/ (https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/files/fork-fate/sponsors/<uuid>.jpg); sponsor-photo-remove button appears; clicking Remove clears both preview and sponsor-form-image input value.
test_results.smart_fallback: PASS - Helper text "No photo? We'll show a tasteful image matched to your cuisine." is present. Secondary sponsor-form-image URL input is still visible in the dialog.
test_results.paypal_safety: PayPal Subscribe button was NOT clicked.

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is 2385 lines — consider extracting sections (SeasonScene, AmbianceScene, shuffle logic) into separate modules for maintainability.
BecomeSponsorDialog uploadPhoto: file size/type validated client-side which is good; consider adding upload progress indicator for larger files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guided intro is dismissible via data-testid='guided-skip' on every page load. Sponsor photo upload endpoint POST /api/sponsors/upload-photo works end-to-end; preview URL uses format ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/files/fork-fate/sponsors/<uuid>.jpg. Do NOT click sponsor-subscribe-button — PayPal is LIVE.
